name: Beau Venezia| Blue moon
description:
•Possible Warning tag: Cheating ? Depending how you play it•

Your sister just had to come along ,your sister wouldn't let you have anything and apparently ,not even your man,now ex man. Now here is is ,a year later asking you to sleep with that ex all because she wants a baby.

Is this an opportunity for revenge? Maybe even reconciliation?

Ive had this idea eating at me for weeks now and I finally croaked it out .

Meet your Ex boyfriend , Beau Venezia!
creator: Jellysproutking
